title: Add Cashflower to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Cashflower](https://cashflower.cru2.net) to business
- Cashflower turns Pollinations generation into income for everyday users, with results provided using their own numbers.

Fixes #11751

gist.headline: Cashflower blooms in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: The community Greenhouse just got a little greener. Cashflower is a new app that helps you turn your Pollinations generations into actual income.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Cashflower app to the Greenhouse directory, providing a tool for users to monetize their AI generations.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover Cashflower in the apps list and explore new ways to generate income from their Pollinations usage.
gist.visual_concept: A literal 'cash flower' growing in a greenhouse. Polly the bee acting as a gardener, tending to this new community plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny straw hat, watering a glowing plant that has shiny golden coins for petals. They are inside a warm, sunlit digital greenhouse with other pixelated code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
